description: You are the community manager for the 'Community Support' project in Redmine. Reorganize the project forums by creating a new board named 'Technical Q&A' with the description 'Strictly for technical support and bug reports'. Move the thread 'Connection Refused on Port 8080' from 'General Discussion' to the new board and lock the 'Weekly Sync Notes - Jan 2024' thread in 'General Discussion'. Log in using admin / Admin1234!.

metadata.expected_board_description: Strictly for technical support and bug reports
